hypothesis: At fixed overall strong-bead fractions (f_poly = f_surf = 0.5) and interaction strengths as in the CG model, the binding free energy ∆F is maximally negative when the polymer sequence correlation length (ξ_p) matches the surface patch correlation length (ξ_s) within ±20%, and is at least 20% less negative when ξ_p/ξ_s ≤ 0.5 or ≥ 2.
